title: Add Poli image and chat to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Poli image and chat](https://poli-sparkle-studio.lovable.app) to image
- Use Poli image and chat to access free source providers and generate professional images or run chat tools.

Fixes #11859

gist.headline: Meet Poli Sparkle Studio
gist.blurb: A new community app just landed in the Greenhouse! Poli Sparkle Studio lets you generate professional images and run chat tools, all powered by our free source providers.
gist.summary: Added the community-built 'Poli image and chat' app to the Greenhouse and Apps directory.
gist.impact: Users can now explore Poli Sparkle Studio to generate professional images and interact with chat tools using free source providers.
gist.visual_concept: The app is called 'Poli Sparkle Studio' and focuses on image generation and chat. Visuals should include a sparkling digital canvas, speech bubbles, and the bee mascot acting as an artist.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, painting on a glowing digital canvas that emits soft sparkles. A chunky retro monitor nearby displays pixelated speech bubbles. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, painting on a glowing digital canvas that emits soft sparkles. A chunky retro monitor nearby displays pixelated speech bubbles. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
